# CWE-325 vulnerable — Missing Cryptographic Step
lang: go
file: CWE-325-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"io"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func EncryptCardField(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	pan := c.PostForm("pan")
	key := []byte("0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
	block, _ := aes.NewCipher(key)
	iv := make([]byte, aes.BlockSize)
	_, _ = io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, iv)
	stream := cipher.NewCTR(block, iv)
	out := make([]byte, len(pan))
	stream.XORKeyStream(out, []byte(pan))
	return db.Exec("UPDATE cards SET cipher = ? WHERE owner = ?", out, c.Query("uid")).Error
}
